title: dianthus angulatus subsp. angulatus
intro: Dianthus angulatus subsp. angulatus, also known as the prickly thrift or pink-fringed pink, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and act as a natural antihistamine. Dianthus angulatus subsp. angulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and holistic treatments.
